Transcrição Completa: What Is A Marketing Agency

Conversa

[00:00]

[music] So, you're probably wondering what in the hell is a marketing agency, right?

[00:05]

Let's be clear. There's all different kinds of names for experts, specialist. You got chatbot guys, email marketers, advertising experts, people saying it's just an ad agency, social media marketing agencies.

[00:18]

There's all kinds of different names for what you can identify with. And just like we're seeing right now in the geopolitical space, you can identify as whatever you'd like.

[00:27]

If you want to call yourself a marketing agency owner, that's great. If you want to call yourself an agency owner, an ad expert, a consultant, it doesn't even matter.

[00:36] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO

─────────────────────────────

TEXTO: "What Is A Marketing Agency"

NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente

VISUAL: Conceito de agência de marketing digital, múltiplas nomenclaturas possíveis, flexibilidade de identificação profissional

[00:38]

The concept of a marketing agency, to be very direct, is you either have digital skills yourself. You're either an advertiser, a graphic design person, a video expert, maybe you just don't even have skills yet, and you want to learn all this digital marketing stuff, so you could go out and sell it.

[00:56]

One of the best things that you could do is network with the other agency owners. Most of them are going to be just like you or a few steps ahead of you, which is great because those are some of the best ways that you can learn how to implement their success into your success.

[01:12] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO

─────────────────────────────

TEXTO: "Strategic Referral Model"

NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente

VISUAL: Rede de especialistas em marketing digital, modelo de referências estratégicas, network de habilidades complementares

[01:15]

More importantly, their skills can become the skills that you sell while you're building your own. So, as an example, if you have no skills, don't worry. You can build your skills while you're selling the skills of others.

[01:28]

Essentially being a salesperson, but independently without having a boss in this case. So, you can get high ticket commissions without having to service any of the work.

[01:38]

If you're referring deals to other experts with those digital marketing skills, you can build a network. I refer to this as the strategic referral model. Okay?

[01:47] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO

─────────────────────────────

TEXTO: "Strategic Referral Network"

NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente

VISUAL: Rede de especialistas: chatbot, Facebook ads, Instagram orgânico, gerenciamento de mídias sociais, copywriting - múltiplas habilidades digitais interconectadas

[01:50]

Your strategic referral network is going to be made up of people who might be a chatbot guy. You might have somebody who's great at Facebook ads. Maybe you got somebody who's great at organic Instagram growth, managing social media accounts. Maybe you got another person that's a great copywriter.

[02:07]

All of these different skills, whether you know of them yet or not, what they can do for businesses yet or not, you're going to find all that out if you don't.

[02:15]

These different skills drive leads and drive revenue into businesses of all kind, in all niche, in all industries. Okay?

[02:23] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO

─────────────────────────────

TEXTO: "Build Skills While Selling"

NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente

VISUAL: Estratégia dupla: desenvolvimento de habilidades próprias + venda de habilidades de terceiros simultaneamente, modelo de contratação e referência

[02:25]

Okay, so to be very clear, while you're investing into building your own skills, which I highly encourage, you can sell the skills of others, you can contract to others, and we're going to go over all the different strategies, tactics, dos, don'ts, successes, failures of that specific strategy and model.

[02:43]

But to be very clear, as a marketing agency owner, you can do whatever you want. You can sell whatever you want. You can sell it for however much you want because you're selling results.

[02:54] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO

─────────────────────────────

TEXTO: "Sell Results, Not Time"

NÚMEROS: $50,000 exemplo de venda por resultado, $200,000 retorno gerado para cliente, 1 hora por mês de trabalho

VISUAL: Comparação entre modelo tradicional (tempo e esforço) vs modelo de resultados, quebra de condicionamento de empregos anteriores, mentalidade de valor vs horas trabalhadas

[02:56]

You're not selling time and effort. Don't confuse yourself or let your previous conditioning from all your jobs that you've worked in your lifetime carry into your agency.

[03:05]

Okay, to be clear, you're going to fuck yourself out of a lot of good money if you're selling time and effort. You're going to be burning a lot of hours in a day, burning the candle at both ends, if you will, burning out unless you start selling results.

[03:20]

Which you could do something an hour a month and sell it for $50,000 if it makes somebody else $200,000 as an example.

[03:28]

So you got to really get familiar and comfortable with that because your previous conditioning from job selling time and effort is going to carry into this and potentially hold you back.

[03:38] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO

─────────────────────────────

TEXTO: "Marketing Agency Freedom"

NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente

VISUAL: Liberdade total de escolha: serviços digitais variados, precificação baseada em valor, venda de resultados, autonomia completa do dono de agência

[03:40]

So without further ado, once again, a marketing agency owner, you can sell whatever digital services you want. We'll have a specific video covering each different digital skill for you so you can understand and comprehend it, understand where and how to train on it to build those skills.

[03:56]

And also we have training inside of the program built out for you where I transfer my skills into you.

[04:02]

Uh, in addition to that, you're going to be able to go into the online community if you still haven't joined that. Ask any questions you have there. Ask any questions as well below these videos.

[04:13]

You're now marketing agency owner, and I'm excited to give you the skills and transfer my knowledge into you so you can become more aware of what that is, how to make money with it, and get started with this whole thing.

[04:25]

So, press the button. Let's go.

📊 RESUMO EXECUTIVO

NÚMEROS PRINCIPAIS:

$50,000 - exemplo de valor de venda por resultado

$200,000 - retorno potencial gerado para cliente

1 hora por mês - tempo de trabalho no exemplo de alto valor

ESTRATÉGIAS E SISTEMAS:

Strategic Referral Model (Modelo de Referências Estratégicas)

Network de especialistas complementares

Venda de habilidades de terceiros enquanto desenvolve as próprias

High ticket commissions sem necessidade de executar o trabalho

Modelo de contratação e subcontratação

Venda baseada em resultados, não em tempo/esforço

ESTRUTURA:

Rede de especialistas: chatbot, Facebook ads, Instagram orgânico, gerenciamento de mídias sociais, copywriting

Comunidade online para suporte e networking

Programa de treinamento com transferência de conhecimento

Vídeos específicos para cada habilidade digital

Sistema de perguntas e respostas integrado

DADOS FINANCEIROS:

Comissões de alto valor (high ticket)

Precificação baseada em resultados entregues

ROI exemplo: investimento de 1h/mês gerando $50K quando cliente ganha $200K

Modelo escalável sem proporcionalidade tempo/dinheiro

DURAÇÃO: 04:30

FORMATO: Vídeo educacional introdutório sobre agências de marketing digital

Copiar
